description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the cutouts and stitch detailing. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear. Team these with dresses, or jeans and tops.UpperSynthetic leather uppers covering the forefoot and midfootStitch detailing with multi-hued patches stitched to form the upperCushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleFlexible rubber outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
